MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER 421-435 BUENA VISTA AVENUE EAST ASSOCIATION Notice Of Motion For Order Fixing Post Judgment Attorneys Fees And Costs is
GRANTED in the amount of $12,855 pursuant to CCP 685.040 and 1033.5(a)(10)(A). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
J. Brian McCauley (415-974-1515) for Plaintiff/Moving party 421-435 BUENA VISTA AVENUE EAST ASSOCIATION.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue is GRANTED. Judgment Debtor's interest in the dwelling shall be sold. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
